name: Crab Stuffed Jalapenos
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut peppers in half lengthwise and discard pulp and seeds.
2. Rinse carefully.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine remaining ingredients except breading mixture.
4. Stuff pepper halves with crab mixture and press stuffing around pepper. Set peppers aside.
5. To prepare Breading Mixture, place cracker meal in a flat pan.
6. Mix together milk, eggs, salt, and pepper.
7. Dip peppers in egg mixture, then in cracker meal.
8. Repeat procedure.
9. Deep fry at 365 degrees until golden brown.
10. Drain on absorbent paper.
